---
title: "Simulation Study — ARFIMA(1,d,0)"
author: "Akshaan Murugesu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
                      fig.height = 4, fig.width = 6)
```

```{r libraries}
library(parallel)
library(pracma)
ncores <- max(1, detectCores() - 1)
```

```{r source}
source(here::here("R", "01_core_estimators.R"))
source(here::here("R", "02_dgm.R"))
source(here::here("R", "03_drivers.R"))
source(here::here("R", "04_summary_tables.R"))
```

## Simulation design

Two values of the long-memory parameter are considered: d = 0.1 (weak long memory)
and d = 0.4 (strong long memory). The AR coefficient is phi = 0.4 throughout.

```{r params}
set.seed(2025)

nsim        <- 1000
phi_true    <- 0.4      # NOTE: 0.3 was used in one early exploratory run;
                        # the thesis tables use phi_true = 0.4. Keep consistent.
d_values    <- c(0.1, 0.4)
n_values    <- c(50, 75, 100, 200, 300)
alpha_grid  <- seq(0, 1, by = 0.05)
innovations <- c("gaussian", "t5", "chisq5", "exp1")
rds_file    <- here::here("outputs", "results_arfima1d0.rds")
```

```{r run-or-load}
if (file.exists(rds_file)) {
  results_arfima1d0 <- readRDS(rds_file)
  message("Loaded cached results from ", rds_file)
} else {
  results_arfima1d0 <- list()
  for (d_true in d_values) {
    d_name <- paste0("d", d_true)
    results_arfima1d0[[d_name]] <- list()
    for (innov in innovations) {
      results_arfima1d0[[d_name]][[innov]] <- list()
      for (n in n_values) {
        cat("ARFIMA(1,d,0) | d =", d_true, "|", innov, "| n =", n, "\n")
        results_arfima1d0[[d_name]][[innov]][[as.character(n)]] <-
          run_hybrid_grid_arfima_phi(
            n = n, nsim = nsim,
            phi_true = phi_true, d_true = d_true,
            alpha_grid = alpha_grid, innov = innov, ncores = ncores
          )
      }
    }
  }
  saveRDS(results_arfima1d0, rds_file)
  message("Results saved to ", rds_file)
}
```

## Plotting helpers

```{r helpers}
pretty_innov_expr <- function(innov) {
  switch(innov,
    gaussian = quote(N(0,1)), t5 = quote(t[5]),
    chisq5   = quote(chi^2[5]), exp1 = quote(Exp(1)), as.name(innov))
}
add_headroom <- function(ylim, pct = 0.05) {
  ylim[2] <- ylim[2] + pct * diff(ylim); ylim
}
eps <- 1e-8
```

## Plots: functional boxplots, error curves, estimator distributions

```{r plots}
for (d_name in names(results_arfima1d0)) {
  d_true <- as.numeric(sub("^d", "", d_name))
  for (innov in innovations) {
    innov_lab <- pretty_innov_expr(innov)
    for (n in n_values) {

      res        <- results_arfima1d0[[d_name]][[innov]][[as.character(n)]]
      hybrid_mat <- res$hybrid
      whittle    <- res$whittle
      fdel       <- res$fdel

      ## ---- Functional boxplot (phi across alpha) ----------------------------
      sq   <- apply(hybrid_mat, 2, quantile, probs = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75), na.rm = TRUE)
      q25  <- sq[1, ]; q50 <- sq[2, ]; q75 <- sq[3, ]

      plot(alpha_grid, q50, type = "n",
           ylim = range(q25, q75, phi_true, na.rm = TRUE),
           xlim = c(min(alpha_grid) - 0.02, max(alpha_grid) + 0.02),
           xlab = expression(alpha), ylab = expression(hat(phi)),
           main = bquote("ARFIMA(1,d,0), d =" ~ .(d_true) * ", T =" ~ .(n) ~
                         ", innovations" ~ .(innov_lab)))
      grid(col = "grey90", lty = "dotted")
      polygon(c(alpha_grid, rev(alpha_grid)), c(q25, rev(q75)),
              col = adjustcolor("lightblue", 0.5), border = NA)
      lines(alpha_grid, q25, col = "blue", lwd = 1.5, lty = 2)
      lines(alpha_grid, q75, col = "blue", lwd = 1.5, lty = 2)
      lines(alpha_grid, q50, col = "blue", lwd = 2)
      abline(h = phi_true, col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 2)
      legend("topleft",
             legend = c("Median", "25–75% band", expression(phi[true])),
             lty = c(1, NA, 2), lwd = c(2, NA, 2),
             pch = c(NA, 15, NA), pt.cex = c(NA, 2, NA),
             col = c("blue", adjustcolor("lightblue", 0.5), "red"), bty = "n")

      ## ---- RMSE curve + oracle alpha ----------------------------------------
      rmse_alpha <- apply(hybrid_mat, 2, rmse, true = phi_true)
      interior   <- alpha_grid > 0 & alpha_grid < 1
      idx_best   <- which(interior)[which.min(rmse_alpha[interior])]
      alpha_best <- alpha_grid[idx_best]
      hyb_best   <- hybrid_mat[, idx_best]

      plot(alpha_grid, rmse_alpha, type = "l", lwd = 2, col = "blue",
           xlab = expression(alpha), ylab = "RMSE",
           ylim = add_headroom(range(rmse_alpha, na.rm = TRUE)),
           main = bquote("RMSE vs" ~ alpha ~ "| ARFIMA(1," * .(d_true) * ",0)" * "\n" *
                         T == .(n) ~ ", innovations" ~ .(innov_lab)))
      grid(col = "grey90", lty = "dotted")
      points(0, rmse_alpha[alpha_grid == 0], pch = 19, col = "darkgreen")
      points(1, rmse_alpha[alpha_grid == 1], pch = 19, col = "purple")
      text(0, rmse_alpha[alpha_grid == 0], "FDEL",    pos = 3, cex = 0.7, xpd = NA)
      text(1, rmse_alpha[alpha_grid == 1], "Whittle", pos = 3, cex = 0.7, xpd = NA)
      abline(v = alpha_best, col = "red", lty = 2)
      text(alpha_best, min(rmse_alpha, na.rm = TRUE),
           bquote(alpha["best"] == .(alpha_best)), pos = 4, cex = 0.7)

      ## ---- Boxplots ----------------------------------------------------------
      lab_expr <- eval(bquote(expression(
        Whittle, FDEL, Hybrid ~ alpha == .(round(alpha_best, 2)))))
      boxplot(list(Whittle = whittle, FDEL = fdel, Hybrid = hyb_best),
              main = bquote("ARFIMA(1," * .(d_true) * ",0), T =" ~ .(n) ~
                            ", innovations" ~ .(innov_lab)),
              ylab = expression(hat(phi)),
              col  = c("purple", "darkgreen", "blue"),
              names = rep("", 3), xaxt = "n")
      abline(h = phi_true, col = "red", lwd = 2, lty = 2)
      axis(1, at = 1:3, labels = lab_expr, tick = FALSE)
    }
  }
}
```

## Summary tables

```{r table}
big_table_arfima <- make_big_table_arfima1d0(results_arfima1d0)
print(big_table_arfima)
```

```{r latex, results='asis'}
to_latex_table_arfima(
  big_table_arfima,
  caption = paste0("Bias, SD and RMSE of Whittle, FDEL and Hybrid estimators for",
                   " ARFIMA(1,d,0) with $\\phi_0 = 0.4$ under different",
                   " innovations and long-memory parameters.")
)
```
